events.title: Pan-African Informatics Olympiad 2026
events.body: Kenya's national team competes at the continental championship. KIO will be sending 4 contestants, 1 team leader, and 1 deputy.

events.title: Team Selection Camp
events.body: 10-day intensive in Nairobi for the top ~30 contestants from the National Round. Selection tests on days 8, 9, and 10.

events.title: National Round
events.body: In-person regional sittings in Nairobi, Mombasa, Kisumu, and Eldoret. 5 problems, 5 hours.

events.title: Open Round
events.body: Online qualifier — open to every Kenyan secondary school student. Registration closes 8 March.

events.title: Registration opens for Cycle 2026
events.body: First official KIO cycle. Schools may also register groups via their ICT coordinator.
